'''Frammel''' was a [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] who served circa [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]]. He held a seat on the [[Senate Defense Council/Legends|Defense Council]] during the [[Yevethan Purge]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
